description:
## Problem
The original async fetch implementation was replaced by a synchronous-in-actor approach, but the old code was never removed. Crystal resolves the duplicate `handle_fetch_and_save` name by overwriting (line 240 replaces line 44), making the old path unreachable dead code.

## Dead code to remove
1. `HttpFetchResult` struct (lines 33-42)
2. `handle_fetch_and_save` at line 44 (async version with `@pending_fetches` channel)
3. `perform_http_fetch` method (lines 56-94)
4. `handle_http_fetch_result` method (lines 176-192)
5. `@pending_fetches` instance variable (line 107)
6. `@pending_fetches` initialization in constructor

## Verification
- `just nix-build` passes
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes
- Grep confirms no remaining references to `HttpFetchResult` or `@pending_fetches`

## File
`src/favicon_storage.cr`

comments.text: Removed HttpFetchResult struct, async handle_fetch_and_save, perform_http_fetch, handle_http_fetch_result, @pending_fetches ivar, and dispatch case

title: Remove dead async fetch code (~100 LOC)
